final:
module comparator (
    input [31:0] obf_a,
    input [31:0] b,
    output reg [1:0] result
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (obf_a > b) begin
            result = 2'b10; // obf_a > b
        end else if (obf_a < b) begin
            result = 2'b01; // obf_a < b
        end else begin
            result = 2'b00; // obf_a == b
        end
    end
endmodule
